prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
An inspection on T-009 has just been completed in the field with no abnormal condition observed. Open a work order documenting that the inspection took place, then close it out with a note recording the clean inspection result.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the newly created work order identifier and its initial status, then confirm a follow-up update that transitions the work order to a closed state with a closure note referencing the clean inspection finding.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [wo] create_work_order — Open a new work order for transformer T-009 to document the completed inspection
  Step 2: [wo] update_work_order — Update the status of the work order to "resolved" and add a note to record the clean inspection result (depends on steps [1])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Open a new work order for transformer T-009 to document the completed inspection",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009",
      "issue_description": "Completed inspection with no abnormal conditions observed",
      "priority": "low"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-FCAACF69\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Completed inspection with no abnormal conditions observed\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:57:40.642827Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order created successfully",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Update the status of the work order to \"resolved\" and add a note to record the clean inspection result",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-FCAACF69",
      "status": "resolved",
      "note": "Inspection completed with no abnormal conditions observed"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-FCAACF69' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-FCAACF69' not found in this session.",
    "success": false,
    "verifier_decision": "error",
    "verifier_reason": "Work order 'WO-FCAACF69' not found in this session."
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The work order for transformer T-009 was successfully opened with ID "WO-FCAACF69", but it was not possible to close it out and record the clean inspection result due to a session error where the work order was not found.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": false, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": true, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Implement session management to persist work orders across interactions"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Implement session management to persist work orders across interactions
